comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Planned from execution-profile architecture review. Consensus: keep /mode as the user-facing command, keep /agents focused on enable/disable, model shared runtime through an execution layer (selector + prompt profile + execution policy + execution profile), and treat Pi as the runtime kernel while tau owns the control plane. Dependency order: tau-xipk -> tau-zrmw -> {tau-czbg, tau-btdv, tau-ba00} -> tau-91qi.
